'''''Pondut''''' was a research [[XQ2 Platform|station]] for the [[Galactic Electronics]] company located in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. The station developed the [[Mag-pulse warhead/Legends|magnetic pulse]] warhead, which could temporarily disable the weapons systems on a craft.

==History==
Galactic Electronics decided to sell the magnetic pulse warhead to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. An [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] law banned the sale of such weapons, but since the Corporate Sector was neutral in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], they could easily bypass this law.

The Rebels used the magnetic pulse in a raid on an [[Research|Imperial Research Station]]. The station security forces captured a Rebel [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighter]] using the warhead, and traced it back to the Corporate Sector, Galactic Electronics, and more specifically, research station ''Pondut''.

[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]] was sent to capture ''Pondut'' and freeze Galactic Electronics' assets. This meant entering neutral Corporate Sector territory, but the deed was still completed. Zaarin was "infrantic about capturing everybody!" according to an [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboat]] pilot. ''Pondut'' was captured with all personnel accounted for. Imperial-Corporate Sector relations were at an all-time low after the skirmish at ''Pondut''.

{{Ship-stub}}
